ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OF CHRISTOPHER MICHAELSON

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Claim Of Christopher Michaelson
Off Calendar Jun-13-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OF CHRISTOPHER MICHAELSON. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted, no opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/EHG) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Claim Of Christopher Michaelson
Off Calendar May-25-2011 Continued To Jun-13-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OF CHRISTOPHER MICHAELSON.

APPEARANCES: Jim Reilly, Esq. of Law Offices of Jim Reilly 796-3529 for claimant & opposing party Christopher Michaelson; no other appearances.

RULING: Counsel for claimant did not comply with the tentative ruling rule re giving proper notice to opposing party of his intent to appear at the hearing, nor was any written opposition filed. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter to 06/13/11 at 9:30am. Opposition to be filed by 06/03/11. Reply to be filed by 06/09/11. Courtesy copies to be lodged with the department. Counsel to give notice. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
